summary:
Desensitizing pastes are effective in managing dentinal hypersensitivity resulting from exposed root surfaces after periodontal dressing removal. They provide timely, specific relief by targeting the underlying cause—root surface exposure—and are thus the most clinically supported intervention at this stage.  

(Note: Only two sentences; focuses solely on key clinical points.)
